title: Regular script正楷字体
description: It is used to beautify fonts, font: Kai Ti (Regular Script)
body:
![What exactly will he change?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/038891cb7bdded70ce2df5620588a63f4a15d18b.png)
### English
It can convert fonts to regular script and supports most languages (no pack.png).
### 中文
它可以将字体转换为楷书，支持大多数语言（没有pack.png).

### What exactly is it used for?
It is used to beautify fonts, font: Kai Ti (Regular Script)

### 这有什么用?
它用于美化字体，字体：楷体（常规）
